mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORGDEPTMASTER01 ( COMPANY, DEPT_CODE, DEPT_NAME, PARENT_DEPT, DEPT_LEADER, DEPT_CATEGORY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE, USE_YN, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{deptCode}, #{deptName}, NULLIF(#{parentDept}, ''), NULLIF(#{deptLeader}, ''), NULLIF(#{deptCategory}, ''), NULLIF(#{workPatternCode}, ''), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), NULLIF(#{startDate}, ''), NULLIF(#{endDate}, ''), GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.select: SELECT d.COMPANY AS company, c.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, d.DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, d.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, d.PARENT_DEPT AS parentDept, p.DEPT_NAME AS parentDeptName, d.DEPT_LEADER AS deptLeader, e.EMP_NAME AS deptLeaderName, d.DEPT_CATEGORY AS deptCategory, d.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AS workPatternCode, d.USE_YN AS useYn, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), d.START_DATE, 23) AS startDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), d.END_DATE, 23) AS endDate, CASE WHEN d.END_DATE IS NULL THEN 'ACTIVE' WHEN CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) > d.END_DATE THEN 'INACTIVE' ELSE 'ACTIVE' END AS dateStatus FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 d LEFT JOIN ORGCOMPANYMASTER01 c ON d.COMPANY = c.COMPANY LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 p ON d.COMPANY = p.COMPANY AND d.PARENT_DEPT = p.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRIMASTER01 e ON d.COMPANY = e.COMPANY AND d.DEPT_LEADER = e.EMP_CODE WHERE d.COMPANY = #{company} ORDER BY d.DEPT_CODE
SELECT DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DEPT_CODE
SELECT EMP_CODE AS empCode, EMP_NAME AS empName FROM HRIMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND RETIRE_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY EMP_CODE

SELECT h.COMPANY AS company, c.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, h.EMP_CODE AS empCode, h.EMP_NAME AS empName, h.DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, h.ROLE_CODE AS roleCode FROM HRIMASTER01 h LEFT JOIN ORGCOMPANYMASTER01 c ON h.COMPANY = c.COMPANY WHERE h.COMPANY = #{company} AND h.DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode} ORDER BY h.EMP_CODE

SELECT d.COMPANY AS company, c.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, d.DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, d.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, d.PARENT_DEPT AS parentDept, d.DEPT_LEADER AS deptLeader, d.DEPT_CATEGORY AS deptCategory, d.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AS workPatternCode, d.USE_YN AS useYn, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), d.START_DATE, 23) AS startDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), d.END_DATE, 23) AS endDate FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 d LEFT JOIN ORGCOMPANYMASTER01 c ON d.COMPANY = c.COMPANY WHERE d.COMPANY = #{company} AND d.DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode}

SELECT h.COMPANY AS company, c.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, h.EMP_CODE AS empCode, h.EMP_NAME AS empName, h.DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, h.ROLE_CODE AS roleCode FROM HRIMASTER01 h LEFT JOIN ORGCOMPANYMASTER01 c ON h.COMPANY = c.COMPANY WHERE h.COMPANY = #{company} AND h.DEPT_CODE IS NULL AND h.RETIRE_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY h.EMP_CODE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 (COMPANY, EMP_CODE, DEPT_CODE, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{company}, #{empCode}, #{deptCode}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE ORGDEPTMASTER01 SET DEPT_NAME = #{deptName}, PARENT_DEPT = NULLIF(#{parentDept}, ''), OLD_DEPT_LEADER = CASE WHEN DEPT_LEADER != #{deptLeader} THEN DEPT_LEADER ELSE OLD_DEPT_LEADER END, DEPT_LEADER = NULLIF(#{deptLeader}, ''), DEPT_CATEGORY = NULLIF(#{deptCategory}, ''), WORK_PATTERN_CODE = NULLIF(#{workPatternCode}, ''), USE_YN = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), START_DATE = NULLIF(#{startDate}, ''), END_DATE = NULLIF(#{endDate}, ''), UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode}
